documents.displayName: Span Capability — Standard-Library Alignment and the ~Escapable Question
documents.topic: Maps Span.Protocol to the stdlib's deferred ContiguousStorage (SE-0447, ~Escapable); records the @_lifetime-requirement convergence (SE-0516 BorrowingSequence, 6.4); the read linchpin is stdlib-intended; a mutable single-span-vending protocol has no stdlib precedent, so a MutableSpan mutable-linchpin is institute-pioneered and soundness-gated; no first-principles barrier to ~Escapable.
documents.statusDetail: read side stdlib-aligned & settled; mutable linchpin gated on EXP-017 soundness, not principle
